prompt: A photorealistic premium magazine cover in the style of an international design and business publication, shot as a sophisticated editorial still life. The cover features a dark, moody interior with shallow depth of field and warm ambient lighting. Center-right, standing upright on a glossy black marble table, is a cream-colored paperback book titled {argument name="book title" default="The Pathless Path"} by {argument name="author name" default="Paul Millerd"}. The book is angled slightly to the left so both the front cover and spine are visible. The cover illustration is minimalist navy-blue line art showing an office interior with an open door leading into a winding outdoor path, framed pictures on the wall, a water cooler, a desk with stacked papers, and a person slumped in an office chair. The author’s name appears near the lower left of the front cover, and the title also runs vertically on the spine. To the left of the book on the marble surface is a small stack of 4 books, softly out of focus, and in the lower-left foreground sits 1 dark coffee cup on a saucer. Behind them is a dim, elegant room with blurred shelving and a soft green plant shape in the background. The magazine masthead dominates the top: {argument name="magazine title" default="MONOCLE"} in very large white serif letters across the width, with small white issue text at top left reading {argument name="issue text" default="MAY 2024 • ISSUE 167"} and small white tagline text at top right reading “THE ENTREPRENEURS’ MAGAZINE”. Beneath the masthead is a thin rule and a category line in small gold serif text with 6 categories separated by dots: “AFFAIRS • BUSINESS • CULTURE • DESIGN • ENTERTAINING • FASHION”. On the left side, large white serif cover headline text reads “Rethinking Success”. Below it is a white serif subheadline about leaving the default path behind and building a life and work that matters, followed by a small gold page number. Further down the left column are 4 editorial teaser blocks, each with a gold circular icon and gold uppercase heading, white descriptive text, and a gold page number. The 4 headings are “ESCAPE THE DEFAULT”, “WORK WITH PURPOSE”, “A NEW STORY”, and a boxed teaser “DESIGN SPECIAL”. At the bottom right is a realistic barcode block with small pricing text above it and a small issue number beside it. The overall layout should feel like a real luxury magazine cover mockup: crisp typography, elegant serif fonts, black, white, cream, and gold palette, glossy reflections on the marble, cinematic shadows, subtle product reflection beneath the book, and high-end editorial photography styling.
translatedPrompt: 一张照片级逼真的高端杂志封面，采用国际设计与商业出版物风格，呈现出精致的编辑静物摄影效果。封面背景为光线昏暗、氛围感十足的室内空间，具有浅景深和温暖的环境光。在右侧中央，一张光亮的黑色大理石桌上竖立着一本奶油色的平装书，书名为 {argument name="book title" default="The Pathless Path"}，作者为 {argument name="author name" default="Paul Millerd"}。书籍略微向左倾斜，以便同时展示封面和书脊。封面插图为极简主义的深蓝色线条画，描绘了一个办公室内部场景：一扇通往蜿蜒户外小径的敞开大门、墙上的相框、饮水机、堆满文件的办公桌，以及一个瘫坐在办公椅上的人。作者姓名出现在封面左下角附近，书名也垂直印在书脊上。在大理石桌面的书籍左侧，有一小叠 4 本虚化处理的书籍，左下角前景处放着 1 个带托盘的深色咖啡杯。背景是一个昏暗而优雅的房间，带有模糊的货架和柔和的绿色植物轮廓。杂志刊头占据了顶部：{argument name="magazine title" default="MONOCLE"}，以巨大的白色衬线字体横跨整个宽度，左上角有小号白色期号文字 {argument name="issue text" default="MAY 2024 • ISSUE 167"}，右上角有小号白色标语文字“THE ENTREPRENEURS’ MAGAZINE”。刊头下方是一条细线和一行小号金色衬线字体的分类栏，包含 6 个以圆点分隔的类别：“AFFAIRS • BUSINESS • CULTURE • DESIGN • ENTERTAINING • FASHION”。在左侧，醒目的白色衬线大标题写着“Rethinking Success”。下方是关于告别默认路径、构建有意义的生活与工作的白色衬线副标题，随后是一个小的金色页码。左侧栏下方有 4 个编辑预告块，每个块都配有一个金色圆形图标、金色大写标题、白色描述性文字和一个金色页码。这 4 个标题分别是“ESCAPE THE DEFAULT”、“WORK WITH PURPOSE”、“A NEW STORY”以及一个带框的预告“DESIGN SPECIAL”。右下角是一个逼真的条形码块，上方有小号价格文字，旁边有小号期号。整体布局应呈现出真实奢华杂志封面样机的质感：清晰的排版、优雅的衬线字体、黑白奶油金配色、大理石上的光泽反射、电影般的阴影、书籍下方细腻的产品倒影，以及高端的编辑摄影风格。

breakdown.creativeCore: 奢华杂志封面与精选书籍展示：此提示词可生成一张照片级逼真的高端杂志封面样机，展示了优雅编辑风格内景中醒目的非虚构类书籍，非常适合出版、品牌推广或宣传视觉素材。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic, editorial, minimalist, luxury, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
